title: Troublesome Trinkets
description: Trinkets are a new class of item that work in your mainhand/offhand and take damage over time. Works best with our other packs!
body:
# Troublesome Trinkets

A customization datapack/mod that adds "Trinkets" to your world. Works best with other RRC packs!

### What Are Trinkets?

Trinkets are a new equipment item type that grant buffs while held in your mainhand or offhand. Instead of granting some form of debuff alongside the perks, the trinkets take durability damage.

As of version 1.0.0 Beta 1, Trinkets are not compatible with any enchantments.

Trinkets do not always give a static buff, but instead can have randomized stats on them as well.

### Obtaining Trinkets

Trinkets are obtained via a variety of methods. Some are only obtainable through our other projects.

As of 1.0.0 Beta 1, only 1 trinket is 100% obtainable & usable as a standalone pack.

### Trinket List

- Trinket For Stride
  - Obtained by killing striders that are in the overworld.
  - Increases step height.
 
### Compatability

- This pack modifies vanilla loot tables and therfor is incompatible with some packs.
  - The full list is contained in the pack files!
- Integrated w/ [Fishing Crates](https://modrinth.com/datapack/random-fishing-crates/versions) 1.21+
  - This pack adds 4 tiers of "Fishing" Trinket, which are dropped from Rare, Epic, Legendary, & Mythic Crates.
  - These trinkets will be made functional by a future project, Mo-Fish.
